settings.title: Settings
model.hint: Create multiple configs with unique names (e.g. "Google - Gemini 2", "Google - Gemini 3") then pick by name in the Generate/Edit Image node.
model.empty: No configurations yet. Click "Add config" to create one.
model.fieldApiKeyPlaceholderEdit: leave blank to keep current key
model.oauthExpired: Session expired — will auto-refresh, or re-login if errors occur.
model.oauthHint: Uses ChatGPT plan quota, no API key needed. Token shared with Codex CLI (~/.codex/auth.json).
toolbar.clearCacheTitle: Clear output cache (next run will re-execute everything, re-call APIs)
toolbar.autoLayoutTitle: Auto-arrange nodes left → right then fit view
toolbar.updateTitle: Version {version} is available — open the download page
status.connLost: Lost backend connection mid-run (backend restart?). Re-run the workflow.
status.backendUnavailable: Cannot connect to backend (port 8000). Please start the backend first.
palette.hint: Click to append to flow, or drag to any position
workflowBrowser.title: Open workflow
workflowBrowser.tabHistoryDisabledTitle: Select a workflow in the List tab first
workflowBrowser.emptyHistory: Select a workflow to view its history.
library.title: Image library
library.uploadNote: Deleting an input image may break saved workflows that use it.
history.title: Run history · {total} records
history.empty: This workflow has no recorded runs.
node.cacheBadgeTitle: Using cached result (won't re-run, won't call API)
node.runTitle: Run up to this node (force this node to regenerate, upstream uses cache)
nodes.text_prompt.title: Prompt
nodes.text_prompt.description: Enter text/prompt to feed into other nodes.
nodes.text_prompt.params.text.label: Content
nodes.load_image.title: Upload image
nodes.load_image.description: Upload an image from your machine as workflow input.
nodes.load_image.params.file_id.label: Image
nodes.combine_text.title: Merge prompts
nodes.combine_text.description: Merge multiple text fragments into one (one per line). Connect as many wires as you like.
nodes.save_image.title: Save image
nodes.save_image.description: Save the image to the outputs/ folder and show the result.
nodes.save_image.params.prefix.label: File name (prefix)
nodes.generate_image.title: Generate image (AI)
nodes.generate_image.description: Generate an image from a prompt. The prompt comes from the input port if connected, otherwise from the prompt typed in the node.
nodes.generate_image.params.prompt.label: Prompt
nodes.edit_image.title: Edit image (AI)
nodes.edit_image.description: Edit/compose an image by prompt: change background, add/remove details, change style... The 'Extra images' port accepts multiple wires — connect as many images as you like.
nodes.edit_image.params.provider.label: Model / Provider
nodes.edit_image.params.prompt.label: Edit prompt
nodes.enhance_prompt.title: Enhance prompt (AI)
nodes.enhance_prompt.description: Use AI to rewrite the prompt into a richer, more detailed one, then pass it to the Generate/Edit image node. The base prompt comes from the input port if connected, otherwise from the prompt typed in the node.
nodes.enhance_prompt.params.prompt.label: Base prompt
nodes.enhance_prompt.params.style.label: Extra guidance (optional)
nodes.enhance_prompt.params.detail.label: Detail level
nodes.extract_region.title: Extract region (AI)
nodes.extract_region.description: Extract/crop an object by description (face/person/clothing/animal...). AI finds the region → crops keeping original pixels. The clearer the description, the more accurate.
nodes.extract_region.params.target.label: Object to extract
nodes.resize.title: Resize
nodes.resize.description: Resize the image (keep aspect ratio if selected).
nodes.resize.params.width.label: Width (px)
nodes.resize.params.height.label: Height (px)
nodes.resize.params.keep_aspect.label: Keep aspect ratio
nodes.filter.title: Filter
nodes.filter.description: Apply a simple filter: grayscale, blur, sharpen...
nodes.filter.params.filter.label: Filter
nodes.filter.params.radius.label: Blur radius
nodes.adjust.title: Adjust color
nodes.adjust.params.brightness.label: Brightness
nodes.adjust.params.contrast.label: Contrast
nodes.adjust.params.saturation.label: Saturation
error.generate_no_prompt: The Generate image node needs a prompt (connect a wire or type one).
error.edit_no_image: The Edit image node needs an input image.
error.edit_no_prompt: The Edit image node needs a prompt describing the change.
error.enhance_no_prompt: The Enhance prompt node needs a base prompt (connect a wire or type one).
error.extract_no_image: The Extract region node needs an input image.
error.extract_no_target: The Extract region node needs a description of the object to extract.
error.load_image_missing: The Upload image node has no image uploaded yet.
error.save_image_no_input: The Save image node needs an input image.
error.provider_no_text_support: This provider does not support text generation. Choose a Gemini, OpenAI, or Codex config for this node.
error.provider_no_vision_support: This provider does not support region detection. Use a Gemini config for the Extract region node.
error.provider_no_image: The provider did not return an image.
error.provider_no_text: The provider did not return any text.
error.region_not_found: Could not find the object in the image. Try a different description or a clearer image.
error.model_config_not_found: Model configuration not found. Open ⚙ Model settings to add one.
error.gemini_no_api_key: No API key set for Gemini. Add a config in ⚙ Model settings or set GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.
error.openai_no_api_key: No API key set for OpenAI. Add a config in ⚙ Model settings or set OPENAI_API_KEY in .env.
error.oauth_not_logged_in: Not logged in to OpenAI (Codex). Open ⚙ Model settings to log in.
error.oauth_expired: OpenAI session expired and could not be refreshed. Please log in again.
error.browser_unavailable: Could not open the browser automatically. Open the link manually to log in.
error.workflow_exists: A workflow with that name already exists.
error.workflow_edge_invalid: An edge connects to a node that does not exist.
error.workflow_cycle: The workflow has a cycle and cannot be executed.
error.config_name_exists: A configuration with that name already exists.
error.node_list_failed: Could not load the node list from the backend.
error.model_configs_failed: Could not load model configuration list.
error.oauth_status_failed: Could not get OpenAI login status.
error.uploads_list_failed: Could not load input image list.
error.outputs_list_failed: Could not load output image list.
